_comment: Hand-authored plain kindergarten clues (grade 0) for very common, concrete words. Guarantees the youngest solvers a rich, well-connected fill pool that no corpus clue can — every clue here is a simple definition with no proper nouns, wordplay, or trivia. Merged into the glue tier by scripts/author-kids-glue.mjs; a word already in the glue simply gains this plain grade-0 clue.
DOG: Pet that barks and wags its tail
PIG: Pink farm animal that says oink
COW: Farm animal that gives us milk
HEN: Bird that lays eggs on the farm
SUN: Bright yellow ball in the daytime sky
SKY: The big blue space above you
SEA: A whole lot of salty water
CAR: You ride in it on the road
HAT: You wear it on your head
BOX: A square thing you put stuff in
NUT: A squirrel likes to eat it
FAN: It blows air to cool you
JAR: A glass thing that holds jam
MAP: It shows you how to get there
NET: You catch a fish or a bug with it
RUG: A soft mat on the floor
LOG: A big piece of a tree trunk
HUG: A big squeeze from someone you love
YAK: Big shaggy animal from the mountains
ZOO: Where you visit the lions and bears
TREE: Tall plant with leaves and a trunk
FROG: Green animal that hops and says ribbit
DUCK: Bird that quacks and swims in a pond
BEAR: Big furry animal that likes honey
LION: Big cat with a fluffy mane
GOAT: Farm animal that likes to climb
WOLF: Wild animal that howls at the moon
SEAL: Ocean animal that claps and barks
CAKE: Sweet treat with candles on your birthday
BEAN: Little veggie that grows in a pod
SOUP: You eat it warm with a spoon
PEAR: Green fruit shaped like a bell
DOOR: You open it to go inside
BOOK: You read the pages in it
BALL: Round thing you bounce and throw
STAR: It twinkles in the night sky
MOON: It glows in the sky at night
SNOW: White fluff that falls when it's cold
WIND: Moving air that blows the leaves
LEAF: Green flat part of a plant
ROSE: A pretty flower with a sweet smell
HAND: You clap and wave with it
FOOT: You stand and walk on it
HAIR: It grows on top of your head
SHOE: You wear it on your foot
SOCK: You wear it under your shoe
COAT: You wear it to stay warm
BOOT: Tall shoe for rain or snow
DESK: A table you do your work at
LAMP: It gives light in a room
DRUM: You bang on it to make a beat
KITE: It flies on a string in the wind
PARK: Grassy place with swings and slides
WING: A bird flaps it to fly
PLANE: It flies you high through the sky
GRASS: Green stuff you mow in the yard
CLOUD: White fluffy shape in the sky
WATER: You drink it when you're thirsty
GREEN: The color of grass and leaves
BROWN: The color of chocolate and dirt
BLACK: The color of the night sky
WHITE: The color of snow and milk
HORSE: Animal you ride that says neigh
SHEEP: Woolly farm animal that says baa
TIGER: Big orange cat with black stripes
ZEBRA: Animal like a horse with stripes
WHALE: The biggest animal in the ocean
RIVER: Water that flows along the land
GRAPE: Small round fruit in a bunch
PEACH: Fuzzy fruit with a big pit
TEETH: The white parts you chew with
SMILE: The happy curve on your face
TABLE: You eat your dinner at it
BREAD: You make a sandwich with it
CLOCK: It tells you what time it is
LIGHT: It helps you see in the dark
BRUSH: You use it on your hair or teeth
PLATE: You put your food on it
GLASS: You pour your milk into it
DRESS: A girl might wear this to a party
SHOES: You wear them on your feet
SOCKS: You wear them under your shoes
BUNNY: A soft animal with long ears
ROBIN: A bird with a red tummy
EAGLE: A big bird with strong wings
PAINT: You brush it on to make colors
CHALK: You draw with it on the sidewalk
STORY: You read it in a book
SLIDE: You go down it at the playground
SWING: You go back and forth on it
CLIMB: To go up, like a tree
LAUGH: What you do at something funny
SLEEP: What you do in bed at night
DREAM: The story in your head while you sleep
CANDLE: You blow it out on a cake
